positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for ko_is_stock_pos

    ~stock(ko)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~profit_appreciation(ko)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    retirement_suitable(ko)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~retirement_suitable(X0) | ~profit_appreciation(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    stock(sK0)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    ~growth_stock(X0) | profit_appreciation(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    growth_stock(sK0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    mature_stock(ko)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~mature_stock(X0) | retirement_suitable(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    profit_appreciation(sK0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
